title: Terra-Concrete!
description: Add a healthy amount of grit to your daily dose of concrete!
body:
Concrete is a block that I normally don't use in my builds because it is too pristine. I don't think the vanilla textures mix well with most other blocks in the game and because of this, I avoid using it. I don't want to avoid using it though, so I made this texture pack to give it some supplemental grit, which I believe makes concrete blocks more palatable.

After making the textures for this pack I realized that they share some similarities with terracotta blocks, hence the name.

I haven't seen anyone else take this approach yet, so I hope you find this helpful

As always, Thanks for stopping by, Enjoy!
